title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF NINTH AVENUE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, MARIA CLARA STREET, CALOOCAN CITY, TO MARIA CLARA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 5264 / 65 OG No. 12, 2843 (March 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5121, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF NINTH AVENUE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, MARIA CLARA STREET, CALOOCAN CITY, TO MARIA CLARA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Ninth Avenue Elementary School, Maria Clara Street, Caloocan City, is hereby changed to Maria Clara Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
